title: Java Software Engineer
description:
**Job Summary:** 




 We are looking for an experienced
 **Senior Java Developer / Lead** 
 with strong expertise in
 **Java, Spring Boot, Microservices architecture, AWS, Kafka, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines** 
 . The candidate will be responsible for designing and building scalable, high\\-performance, and cloud\\-native applications.
 



**Mandatory Skills:** 



* **Java (Core Java, Java 8\\+)**
* **Spring Boot \\& Microservices Architecture**
* **AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, etc.)**
* **Apache Kafka (Event\\-driven architecture)**
* **Kubernetes (Container orchestration)**
* **CI/CD Tools** 
 (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, etc.)



**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Design and develop
 **scalable microservices\\-based applications**
* Build and maintain
 **RESTful APIs using Spring Boot**
* Implement
 **event\\-driven architecture using Kafka**
* Deploy and manage applications on
 **AWS cloud**
* Containerize applications using
 **Docker** 
 and orchestrate with
 **Kubernetes**
* Build and manage
 **CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments**
* Ensure
 **high availability, performance, and security** 
 of applications
* Perform
 **code reviews, mentoring, and technical guidance**
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams in
 **Agile/Scrum environment**
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues



**Good to Have:** 



* Experience with
 **Terraform / Infrastructure as Code**
* Knowledge of
 **Monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK)**
* Exposure to
 **Domain\\-Driven Design (DDD)**
* Experience in
 **high\\-scale distributed systems**

title: Senior Software Engineer, Database
description:
**About ValGenesis**
 ValGenesis is a leading digital validation platform provider for life sciences companies. ValGenesis suite of products are used by 30 of the top 50 global pharmaceutical and biotech companies to achieve digital transformation, total compliance and manufacturing excellence/intelligence across their product lifecycle.
   

  

 Learn more about working for ValGenesis, the de facto standard for paperless validation in Life Sciences: https://www.valgenesis.com/about
   

  

 About the Role:
   

  

 We are looking for experienced database developer who could join our engineering team to build the enterprise applications for our global customers. If you are a technology enthusiast and have passion to develop enterprise cloud products with quality, security, and performance, we are eager to discuss with you about the potential role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Database Development
* Utilize expertise in MS SQL Server, PostgreSQL to design and develop efficient and scalable database solutions.
* Collaborate with development stakeholders to understand and implement database requirements.
* Write and optimize complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and functions.
* Database tuning \\& configurations of servers
* Knowledge on both Cloud \\& on\\-premises database
* Knowledge of SaaS based applications development
* ETL Integration
* Leverage experience with ETL tools such as ADF and SSIS to facilitate seamless data migration.
* Design and implement data extraction, transformation, and loading processes.
* Ensure data integrity during the ETL process and troubleshoot any issues that may arise.
* Reporting
* Develop and maintain SSRS reports based on customer needs.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to understand reporting requirements and implement effective solutions.
* Performance Tuning
* Database performance analysis using Dynatrace, NewRelic or similar tools.
* Analyze query performance and implement tuning strategies to optimize database performance.
* Conduct impact analysis and resolve production issues within specified SLAs.
* Version Control and Collaboration
* Utilize GIT and SVN for version control of database scripts and configurations.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams using tools such as JIRA for story mapping, tracking, and issue resolution.
* Documentation
* Document database architecture, processes, and configurations.
* Provide detailed RCA (Root Cause Analysis) for any database\\-related issues.


**Requirements**
* 6 \\- 9 years of hands\\-on experience in software development.
* Must have extensive experience in stored procedure development and performance fine tuning.
* Proficient in SQL, MS SQL Server, SSRS, and SSIS.
* Working knowledge of C\\# ASP.NET web application development.
* Ability to grasp new concepts and facilitate continuous learning.
* Strong sense of responsibility and accountability.


**We’re on a Mission**
 In 2005, we disrupted the life sciences industry by introducing the world’s first digital validation lifecycle management system. ValGenesis VLMS® revolutionized compliance\\-based corporate validation activities and has remained the industry standard.
   

  

 Today, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation ― enhancing and expanding our portfolio beyond validation with an end\\-to\\-end digital transformation platform. We combine our purpose\\-built systems with world\\-class consulting services to help every facet of GxP meet evolving regulations and quality expectations.
   

  

**The Team You’ll Join**
 Our customers’ success is our success. We keep the customer experience centered in our decisions, from product to marketing to sales to services to support. Life sciences companies exist to improve humanity’s quality of life, and we honor that mission.
   

  

 We work together. We communicate openly, support each other without reservation, and never hesitate to wear multiple hats to get the job done.
   

  

 We think big. Innovation is the heart of ValGenesis. That spirit drives product development as well as personal growth. We never stop aiming upward.
   

  

 We’re in it to win it. We’re on a path to becoming the number one intelligent validation platform in the market, and we won’t settle for anything less than being a market leader.
   

  

**How We Work**
 Our Chennai, Hyderabad and Bangalore offices are onsite, 5 days per week. We believe that in\\-person interaction and collaboration fosters creativity, and a sense of community, and is critical to our future success as a company.
   

  

 ValGenesis is an equal\\-opportunity employer that makes employment decisions on the basis of merit. Our goal is to have the best\\-qualified people in every job. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other characteristics protected by local law.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
company_industry: Hospitality, Food and Beverage Services, and Retail

title: Software Quality Assurance Engineer
description:
**QA Engineer (Manual \\+ Automation)** 




  





**Location:** 
 Ahmedabad, India
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full\\-time, Onsite
 



**Experience:** 
 1\\-3 Years
 



  





**About AlmaShines** 




 AlmaShines, founded by 3 IIT Kanpur alumni, is India's largest and fastest\\-growing community management platform and one of the most advanced community management systems worldwide. Trusted by 2,000\\+ networks across the globe and loved by over 6\\.5 million users, we help institutions, organizations, NGOs, and professional networks build meaningful communities and deliver exceptional value to their members.
 



  





 Being a bootstrapped company, we celebrate our customers as our true investors, upholding an unwavering commitment to value creation, lasting partnerships, and sustainable community growth through robust technology, tailor\\-made configurations, and automation.
 



  





 Website: www.almashines.io
 



  





**The Challenge You'll Own** 




 AlmaShines is a high\\-scale SaaS product with 2,000\\+ B2B clients, over 50 lakh end users, and 3\\-5 lakh monthly active users. We operate in a fast\\-paced agile environment, shipping updates continuously. In this world, quality is not optional. 
 



  





 Every feature, every button, every workflow must work flawlessly and feel right. As our QA Engineer, you will be the last line of defense between our code and our users, ensuring everything we ship meets the highest bar of functionality, reliability, and user experience.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are looking for a sharp, detail\\-obsessed QA Engineer who blends strong manual testing instincts with modern automation skills. 
 



  





 You'll work closely with product managers, developers, designers and customer success teams to catch issues before they reach users and build systems that catch them automatically over time. If you've been exploring how AI is reshaping software testing, you'll fit right in here.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\\. Manual Testing** 



* Design \\& run detailed test cases for new features, bug fixes, and regression scenarios.
* Perform testing to uncover edge cases and UX inconsistencies that scripted tests miss.
* Validate UI, functional, and integration behaviour across web and mobile platforms.
* Reproduce, document, and track bugs with clear reproduction steps and severity assessments.
* Collaborate with developers to understand feature logic and ensure end\\-to\\-end coverage.



**2\\. Automation Testing** 



* Build and maintain automated test suites for critical workflows and regression coverage.
* Design automation frameworks that are stable, scalable, and easy for the team to extend.
* Monitor test results, analyse failures, and keep tests up to date as the product evolves.



**3\\. AI\\-Augmented QA** 



* Explore and integrate AI\\-powered testing tools for test case generation, smart regression selection, and visual testing.
* Stay current with emerging QA tools, techniques, and best practices in the fast\\-evolving AI testing landscape.
* Propose and pilot new approaches that increase test efficiency and coverage without proportional effort growth.



**4\\. Quality Ownership** 



* Participate actively in sprint planning, story reviews, and release sign\\-offs.
* Maintain up\\-to\\-date test documentation, test plans, and bug tracking records.
* Work with product and customer success teams to triage and prioritise quality issues based on user impact.
* Contribute to defining and improving QA processes, standards, and best practices across the team.



  





**What We're Looking For** 




**Must\\-Have** 



* 1\\-3 years of hands\\-on QA experience
* Solid manual testing skills: test case design, exploratory testing, and defect management.
* Practical experience with at least one automation tool or framework (e.g. Selenium, Playwright, Cypress, Appium).
* Exposure to agile development processes and working within sprint cycles.
* Strong attention to detail and clear communication skills to document and articulate issues effectively.



  





**Good to Have** 



* Hands\\-on experience with AI\\-powered QA tools (e.g. Testim, Mabl, Applitools, or similar).
* Knowledge of performance testing concepts (load, stress, scalability).
* Familiarity with API testing tools such as Postman or REST Assured.
* Basic programming knowledge in Python, Java, or JavaScript to support automation work.



  





**Why Join AlmaShines?** 



* Test at real scale: a live platform with millions of users means your work has direct, visible impact every single day.
* Ship and learn fast: our agile culture means you're always testing new features, sharpening your skills, and growing with the product.
* Lead AI\\-driven quality: we actively encourage experimenting with AI\\-powered testing tools, giving you an edge in modern QA practices.
* QA is a first\\-class discipline here, not an afterthought. You'll have a real seat at the table and genuine ownership of product quality.



  





**Compensation \\& Perks** 




**CTC:** 
 INR 4,20,000 / Year
 



**Medical Cover:** 
 Medical insurance and wellness perks
 



**Leaves:** 
 24 paid leaves per year
 



**Culture:** 
 High\\-growth environment with ownership, learning, and meaningful impact
 



  





**We’re looking for candidates with at least 1 year of QA experience who are available to work from our Ahmedabad office. If that fits you, apply today and be part of Almashines.**

title: Principal Engineer – AI & Technology Systems
description:
**Principal Engineer – AI \\& Technology Systems** 




**Function:** 
 R\\&D
 



**Location:** 
 Gurgaon
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full\\-Time
 



**Experience:** 
 7\\+ years
 



  





**About the Role** 




 Lenskart’s R\\&D function is building the next generation of technology\\-led vision care systems, including AI\\-assisted eye testing, intelligent retail workflows, connected devices, automation systems, and software\\-led diagnostic experiences.
 



 We are looking for a
 **Principal Engineer – AI \\& Technology Systems** 
 to join the R\\&D function as a senior technical builder and systems leader. This role is meant for someone who has built real products, platforms, tools, or technology solutions and can take ambiguous R\\&D problems from concept to working prototype, pilot, and scalable implementation.
 



 This is not a product management role. We are looking for a hands\\-on technical leader with strong software engineering depth, AI exposure, system architecture capability, and the ability to lead multidisciplinary execution across software, AI, data, devices, and real\\-world workflows.
 



**Role Objective** 




 The person will act as a senior technical owner within the R\\&D function, helping convert high\\-potential ideas into robust, testable, and deployable technology systems.
 



 The ideal candidate should be able to:
 


* Understand complex real\\-world problems
* Define the technical architecture of solutions
* Build and guide software/AI systems
* Lead engineers and external partners
* Validate prototypes in real operating environments
* Convert successful experiments into scalable systems



**Key Responsibilities** 




**AI \\& Technology Systems Architecture** 



* Define system architecture for AI\\-native and software\\-led R\\&D projects.
* Design scalable solutions involving backend systems, frontend interfaces, APIs, databases, AI/ML models, cloud/local deployment, and device integrations.
* Evaluate technical trade\\-offs across performance, reliability, latency, scalability, security, usability, and maintainability.
* Build systems that can work reliably in real\\-world retail, optometry, diagnostic, and consumer environments.
* Create architecture documentation, technical specifications, integration flows, and validation plans.



**Applied AI and Intelligent Workflow Development** 



* Lead the development of AI\\-assisted workflows involving decision engines, conversational systems, speech\\-to\\-text, NLP, computer vision, recommendation systems, and human\\-in\\-the\\-loop intelligence.
* Work with AI/ML teams, software engineers, and domain experts to convert AI capabilities into usable products.
* Evaluate AI models and systems not only for accuracy, but also for latency, reliability, user experience, failure handling, and deployment feasibility.
* Build feedback loops for continuous improvement of AI\\-enabled systems.
* Ensure AI systems are practical, explainable where required, and aligned with real user workflows.



**R\\&D Execution and Prototyping** 



* Convert ambiguous R\\&D goals into clear technical milestones, experiments, prototypes, and implementation plans.
* Build proof\\-of\\-concepts quickly while maintaining sound engineering judgment.
* Identify technical risks early and create mitigation plans.
* Lead rapid prototyping, technical validation, pilot deployment, and iteration.
* Work closely with the R\\&D Lead to prioritize ideas based on technical feasibility, business impact, scalability, and speed of execution.
* Ensure that successful prototypes are designed with a clear path toward productionization.



**Software, Data, and Device Integration** 



* Guide development across backend, frontend, data pipelines, AI services, dashboards, control systems, and integration layers.
* Support integration with external devices, instruments, sensors, APIs, control interfaces, and third\\-party software systems.
* Create robust communication between software systems and physical\\-world workflows.
* Define data capture, storage, processing, and analytics requirements for R\\&D systems.
* Ensure systems are testable, observable, maintainable, and secure.



**Technical Leadership** 



* Mentor and guide software engineers, AI/ML engineers, data engineers, and integration teams.
* Review technical designs, architecture decisions, code quality, and implementation approaches.
* Help build a high\\-performance engineering culture inside the R\\&D function.
* Bring clarity to complex technical discussions and drive decisions under ambiguity.
* Support hiring, evaluation, onboarding, and development of technical talent.
* Work with internal teams and external vendors to ensure strong execution quality.



**Cross\\-Functional Collaboration** 



* Collaborate with R\\&D, product, business, retail operations, optometry, design, data science, and engineering teams.
* Translate business and operational needs into robust technical solutions.
* Communicate complex technical topics clearly to technical and non\\-technical stakeholders.

**What We Are Not Looking For** 




 This role is not suitable for someone who is only a product manager, project manager, scrum master, or coordination\\-focused leader.
 



 We are not looking for someone who only manages timelines without owning technical decisions.
 



 We are not looking for someone who has only worked on theoretical AI models without building usable systems.

**Ideal Candidate Profile**

**One\\-Line Summary**
